title: agrostis conspicua
intro: Agrostis conspicua, also known as Showy Hair Grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis conspicua include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant properties. Agrostis conspicua can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
